description: CompositionCream round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest print FittingComfort Wash Care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Let your humorous side break free and become the favourite of your gang in this tidal foam t-shirt from tantra. Team this with jeans or cargoes for that uber cool summery
